name: Gungnir Resources Inc.
description: Gungnir Resources Inc. is a Canadian-based mineral exploration company with gold and base metal exploration projects in northern Sweden. The company's key assets include the Lappvattnet and Mjövattnet nickel-copper-cobalt-PGE deposits, as well as the Knaften gold-copper-zinc project. Gungnir is focused on discovering and developing high-grade nickel and gold resources in a mining-friendly jurisdiction with excellent infrastructure.
